summary: Completed frontend testing for footer About links fix and product catalog update. All 10 test cases passed: Footer About links (Our Story, Farm Partners, Sourcing Philosophy, Contact Us) are now proper clickable Link/anchor elements with correct navigation. Product catalog shows exactly 8 products (7 mango varieties + Shahi Litchi) with correct prices (₹1,799/5kg for mangoes, ₹699/2kg for litchi). Homepage variety tags display all 8 varieties. Product hover interactions and WhatsApp pre-order links work correctly.
passed_tests: Footer About 'Our Story' link: clickable <a> tag, navigates to /
Footer About 'Farm Partners' link: clickable <a> tag, navigates to /
Footer About 'Sourcing Philosophy' link: clickable <a> tag, navigates to /village-pantry
Footer About 'Contact Us' link: clickable <a> tag, opens WhatsApp (wa.me/918107722137) in new tab
Product catalog on /mango-harvest: shows exactly 8 products (7 mangoes + 1 litchi)
All 7 mango product cards display ₹1,799 / 5 kg box price
Shahi Litchi card displays ₹699 / 2 kg box price with min 2 kg quantity
Homepage season harvest section shows all 8 variety tags (Dudhiya Malda, Langra, Bambai, Chausa, Dashehari, Gulabkhas, Kishen Bhog, Shahi Litchi)
Product hover/tap interactions work (quantity selector +/-, Pre Order Now button)
WhatsApp pre-order link generates correct message with product name, quantity, and price
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - public marketing website
context_for_next_testing_agent: Footer About section links have been fixed - now using proper Link/anchor elements instead of non-clickable spans. Product catalog updated with 7 mango varieties (Dudhiya Malda, Langra, Bambai, Chausa, Dashehari, Gulabkhas, Kishen Bhog) all at ₹1,799/5kg + Shahi Litchi at ₹699/2kg. All data-testid attributes are in place for testing. WhatsApp ordering uses wa.me URL links.
